title: 10 best herbal tinctures for oily hair
description: Sage tinctures helps with oily hair because of its natural astringent properties, which help to balance and regulate oil production in the scalp. The herb's antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds also work to calm irritation and reduce flaking, making it an excellent solution for those struggling with greasy locks. Additionally, sage's ability to stimulate blood flow promotes healthy hair growth, leaving your tresses looking vibrant and healthy....
